<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Carbon\Doctrine; class DateTimeDefaultPrecision { private static $precision = 6; /** * Change the default Doctrine datetime and datetime_immutable precision. * * @param int $precision */ public static function set(int $precision): void { self::$precision = $precision; } /** * Get the default Doctrine datetime and datetime_immutable precision. * * @return int */ public static function get(): int { return self::$precision; } }
